compounddef.innerclass: RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder::Build_BuilderType< ddc::SplineBuilder2D< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplinesROriginal, BSplinesThetaOriginal, GridROriginal, GridThetaOriginal, BcLower1, BcUpper1, BcLower2, BcUpper2, Solver > >

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::ExecSpace = typename SplineBuilder::exec_space
memberdef.name: ExecSpace

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::MemorySpace = typename SplineBuilder::memory_space
memberdef.name: MemorySpace

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::BSplinesROriginal = typename SplineBuilder::bsplines_type1
memberdef.name: BSplinesROriginal

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::BSplinesThetaOriginal = typename SplineBuilder::bsplines_type2
memberdef.name: BSplinesThetaOriginal

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::R = typename BSplinesROriginal::continuous_dimension_type
memberdef.name: R

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::Theta = typename BSplinesThetaOriginal::continuous_dimension_type
memberdef.name: Theta

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::GrevillePointsR = ddc::GrevilleInterpolationPoints< BSplinesRRefined, SplineBuilder::builder_type1::s_bc_xmin, SplineBuilder::builder_type1::s_bc_xmax>
memberdef.name: GrevillePointsR

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::GrevillePointsTheta = ddc::GrevilleInterpolationPoints< BSplinesThetaRefined, SplineBuilder::builder_type2::s_bc_xmin, SplineBuilder::builder_type2::s_bc_xmax>
memberdef.name: GrevillePointsTheta

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::GridROriginal = typename SplineBuilder::interpolation_domain_type1
memberdef.name: GridROriginal

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::GridThetaOriginal = typename SplineBuilder::interpolation_domain_type2
memberdef.name: GridThetaOriginal

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::RefinedSplineBuilder = typename Build_BuilderType<SplineBuilder>::type
memberdef.name: RefinedSplineBuilder

memberdef.type: ddc::SplineEvaluator2D< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplinesRRefined, BSplinesThetaRefined, GridRRefined, GridThetaRefined, typename SplineEvaluator::lower_extrapolation_rule_1_type, typename SplineEvaluator::upper_extrapolation_rule_1_type, typename SplineEvaluator::lower_extrapolation_rule_2_type, typename SplineEvaluator::upper_extrapolation_rule_2_type >
memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::RefinedSplineEvaluator = ddc::SplineEvaluator2D< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplinesRRefined, BSplinesThetaRefined, GridRRefined, GridThetaRefined, typename SplineEvaluator::lower_extrapolation_rule_1_type, typename SplineEvaluator::upper_extrapolation_rule_1_type, typename SplineEvaluator::lower_extrapolation_rule_2_type, typename SplineEvaluator::upper_extrapolation_rule_2_type>
memberdef.name: RefinedSplineEvaluator

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::IdxRangeSplines = IdxRange<BSplinesRRefined, BSplinesThetaRefined>
memberdef.name: IdxRangeSplines

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::IdxRangeInterpolationPoints = IdxRange<GridRRefined, GridThetaRefined>
memberdef.name: IdxRangeInterpolationPoints

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::IdxInterpolationPoints = typename IdxRangeInterpolationPoints::discrete_element_type
memberdef.name: IdxInterpolationPoints

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::SplineCoeffsMem = DFieldMem<IdxRangeSplines, MemorySpace>
memberdef.name: SplineCoeffsMem

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::SplineCoeffs = typename SplineCoeffsMem::span_type
memberdef.name: SplineCoeffs

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::InterpolationFieldMem = DFieldMem<IdxRangeInterpolationPoints, MemorySpace>
memberdef.name: InterpolationFieldMem

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::InterpolationField = typename InterpolationFieldMem::span_type
memberdef.name: InterpolationField

memberdef.definition: using RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::MappingType = DiscretePoloidalCSSplineMapping<X, Y, RefinedSplineEvaluator>
memberdef.name: MappingType

briefdescription.para: The type of the mapping that will be created.

memberdef.definition: SplineCoeffsMem RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::m_curvilinear_to_x_spline_alloc
memberdef.name: m_curvilinear_to_x_spline_alloc

memberdef.definition: SplineCoeffsMem RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::m_curvilinear_to_y_spline_alloc
memberdef.name: m_curvilinear_to_y_spline_alloc

memberdef.definition: RefinedSplineEvaluator RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::m_evaluator
memberdef.name: m_evaluator

memberdef.definition: IdxRange<GridRRefined, GridThetaRefined> RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::m_idx_range_singular_point
memberdef.name: m_idx_range_singular_point

memberdef.definition: RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder
memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, Mapping const &analytical_mapping, SplineBuilder const &builder, SplineEvaluator const &evaluator)
memberdef.name: RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder

briefdescription.para: Create an instance of the class capable of providing a DiscretePoloidalCSSplineMapping class instance.

parameterdescription.para: The execution space where this class runs any for loops.
The analytical mapping to be described by this discrete mapping.
A spline builder to be used to create a spline approximating the analytical mapping.
A spline evaluator to be used to evaluate a spline approximating the analytical mapping.

memberdef.definition: DiscretePoloidalCSSplineMapping< X, Y, RefinedSplineEvaluator > RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::operator()
memberdef.name: operator()

memberdef.definition: void RefinedDiscretePoloidalCSSplineMappingBuilder< X, Y, SplineBuilder, SplineEvaluator, ncells_r, ncells_theta >::set_curvilinear_to_cartesian_values
memberdef.argsstring: (InterpolationField curvilinear_to_x_vals, InterpolationField curvilinear_to_y_vals, Mapping const &analytical_mapping, IdxRangeInterpolationPoints const &interpolation_idx_range)
memberdef.name: set_curvilinear_to_cartesian_values

briefdescription.para: Fill in the curvilinear fields with interpolation points mapped with the given analytical mapping.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be private. It is not due to the inclusion of a KOKKOS_LAMBDA

parameterdescription.para: Index range of an interpolation grid.

briefdescription.para: A class to create a DiscretePoloidalCSSplineMapping instance from an analytical mapping. This class creates an instance which uses more refined splines than the provided builder and evaluator. This class creates and stores splines memory spaces describing the analytical mapping. The discrete mapping is then created using the splines without copying data.

parameterdescription.para: An operator for building spline coefficients.
An operator for evaluating a spline.
The number of cells in the refined spline in the radial direction.
The number of cells in the refined spline in the radial direction.
